visa_types.name: Temporary Visitor Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please find the below guidance that is  suitable to your purpose of travel.
1) PRC passport holders (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424455.pdf)

2) HKDI and Macau Travel Document holders (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424456.pdf)
3) Russia / CIS (The Commonwealth of Independent States) / Georgia (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424457.pdf) 
4) Other nationalities (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424458.pdf) 
5) Domestic Helper applicants (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/hVQ7cRz9dWcS4WGlQ3R33/fd8bb962379691aa02a1841d7cee65a1/Domestic-Helper-applicants-2025.pdf)
6) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for the Nationals of People’s Republic of China (PRC) (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424460.pdf)
7) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for Holders of HKDI / Macau Travel Permit (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21SfIxnSa53UIqK06btuGB/c5d452a71e70ccad9b4c83f199515d78/multiple-temporary-visitor-visas-for-holders-of-hkdi-macau-travel-permit.pdf)
8) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for the Nationals of India (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/75NziCAzhtIzvb7oRbp1uy/55a5f76dba8a7c64f8e11b4db7918ab0/multiple-temporary-visitor-visas-for-the-nationals-of-india.pdf)
9) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for the Nationals of Indonesia, Philippines, and Vietnam (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3jstAv6bSO4rQVSI4FTV5C/5e4836be8eea0ee161be180568f9a3dd/multiple-temporary-visitor-visas-for-the-nationals-of-indonesia-philippines-and-vietnam.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 22 April 2026.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 72 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 28
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 110
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 80 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 317 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 246 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.
visa_types.processing_time: In principle, the visa application process takes a minimum of one week from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Consulate-General of Japan in Hong Kong).
visa_types.forms:
Visa application form to enter Japan (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/jp/docs/2012_visa_app_info.pdf)
Certificate of employment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/company_letter.pdf)
Certificate of enrollment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/school_letter.pdf)
Letter of reason for invitation (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000137089.pdf)
Schedule of stay (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262548.pdf)
Letter of guarantee (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262545.pdf)
Overview of Company/Organization (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262547.pdf)
Guarantee letter from the employer (for domestic helpers)  (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/dome_helper_form_e.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Temporary visitor visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing, visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances; and short-term business affairs.
Please note that all of the above purposes of journey to Japan shall exclude any activities engaging or involving the management of business or remuneration.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Temporary visitor visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing, visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances; and short-term business affairs.
Please note that all of the above purposes of journey to Japan shall exclude any activities engaging or involving the management of business or remuneration.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Temporary Visitor Visa]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 22 April 2026.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 72 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 28
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 110
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 80 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 317 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 246 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.

## Documents Required
Please find the below guidance that is  suitable to your purpose of travel.
1) PRC passport holders (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424455.pdf)

2) HKDI and Macau Travel Document holders (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424456.pdf)
3) Russia / CIS (The Commonwealth of Independent States) / Georgia (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424457.pdf) 
4) Other nationalities (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424458.pdf) 
5) Domestic Helper applicants (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/hVQ7cRz9dWcS4WGlQ3R33/fd8bb962379691aa02a1841d7cee65a1/Domestic-Helper-applicants-2025.pdf)
6) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for the Nationals of People’s Republic of China (PRC) (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100424460.pdf)
7) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for Holders of HKDI / Macau Travel Permit (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21SfIxnSa53UIqK06btuGB/c5d452a71e70ccad9b4c83f199515d78/multiple-temporary-visitor-visas-for-holders-of-hkdi-macau-travel-permit.pdf)
8) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for the Nationals of India (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/75NziCAzhtIzvb7oRbp1uy/55a5f76dba8a7c64f8e11b4db7918ab0/multiple-temporary-visitor-visas-for-the-nationals-of-india.pdf)
9) Multiple Temporary Visitor Visas for the Nationals of Indonesia, Philippines, and Vietnam (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3jstAv6bSO4rQVSI4FTV5C/5e4836be8eea0ee161be180568f9a3dd/multiple-temporary-visitor-visas-for-the-nationals-of-indonesia-philippines-and-vietnam.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Please submit passport-size color photo(s) along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Taken within 6 months
- 45mm X 35mm
- Color photo with plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- Taken without hat
Please note the Consulate-General may request for a new photo if it doesn’t meet the specifications.

## Processing Time
In principle, the visa application process takes a minimum of one week from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Consulate-General of Japan in Hong Kong).

## Download Forms

Visa application form to enter Japan (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/jp/docs/2012_visa_app_info.pdf)
Certificate of employment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/company_letter.pdf)
Certificate of enrollment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/school_letter.pdf)
Letter of reason for invitation (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000137089.pdf)
Schedule of stay (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262548.pdf)
Letter of guarantee (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262545.pdf)
Overview of Company/Organization (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262547.pdf)
Guarantee letter from the employer (for domestic helpers)  (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/dome_helper_form_e.pdf)

visa_types.name: Working Holidays Scheme
visa_types.documents_required:
- Please
click here (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100597420.pdf)
for the detailed information.
visa_types.visa_fees:
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Working Holidays Scheme]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 1 May 2024.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 70 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 27
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 107
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 78 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 310 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 240 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Other Notices:
Visa fees will be waived for foreign nationals visiting Miyagi, Fukushima, or Iwate prefectures (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/201603_visa_info_eng.pdf). Kindly  please prepare for the hotel booking and keep your invoices / booking records  for future references.

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.
visa_types.processing_time:
Visa Application Schedule
- First Period
- Application period : 13 January (Mon) – 24 January (Fri)
Result announcement day : 14 February (Fri)
Visa issue period : 17 February (Mon) – 28 February (Fri)
- Second Period
- Application period : 7 April (Mon) – 17 April (Thu)
Result announcement day : 16 May (Fri)
Visa issue period : 19 May (Mon) – 30 May (Fri)
- Third Period
- Application period : 7 July (Mon) – 18 July (Fri)
Result announcement day : 15 August (Fri)
Visa issue period : 18 August (Mon) – 29 August (Fri)
- Fourth Period
- Application period : 22 September (Mon) – 3 October (Fri)
Result announcement day : 31 October (Fri)
Visa issue period : 3 November (Mon) – 14 November (Fri)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
With the aim of giving young Hong Kong people the opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the culture and general way of life of Japan, the working holiday scheme will allow those who meet the conditions to stay on holiday in Japan for up to one year and secondarily to take up employment there in order to supplement their travel funds.
Please note that Working Holiday applications must be submitted in person.
For details, please click here (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_en/working_holiday.html)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
With the aim of giving young Hong Kong people the opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the culture and general way of life of Japan, the working holiday scheme will allow those who meet the conditions to stay on holiday in Japan for up to one year and secondarily to take up employment there in order to supplement their travel funds.
Please note that Working Holiday applications must be submitted in person.
For details, please click here (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_en/working_holiday.html)

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Working Holidays Scheme]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 1 May 2024.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 70 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 27
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 107
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 78 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 310 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 240 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Other Notices:
Visa fees will be waived for foreign nationals visiting Miyagi, Fukushima, or Iwate prefectures (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/201603_visa_info_eng.pdf). Kindly  please prepare for the hotel booking and keep your invoices / booking records  for future references.

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.

## Documents Required
- Please
click here (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100597420.pdf)
for the detailed information.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit passport-size color photo(s) along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Taken within 6 months
- 45mm X 35mm
- Color photo with plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- Taken without hat
Please note the Consulate-General may request for a new photo if it doesn’t meet the specifications.

## Processing Time
Visa Application Schedule
- First Period
- Application period : 13 January (Mon) – 24 January (Fri)
Result announcement day : 14 February (Fri)
Visa issue period : 17 February (Mon) – 28 February (Fri)
- Second Period
- Application period : 7 April (Mon) – 17 April (Thu)
Result announcement day : 16 May (Fri)
Visa issue period : 19 May (Mon) – 30 May (Fri)
- Third Period
- Application period : 7 July (Mon) – 18 July (Fri)
Result announcement day : 15 August (Fri)
Visa issue period : 18 August (Mon) – 29 August (Fri)
- Fourth Period
- Application period : 22 September (Mon) – 3 October (Fri)
Result announcement day : 31 October (Fri)
Visa issue period : 3 November (Mon) – 14 November (Fri)

## Download Forms
Visa application form to enter Japan (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/jp/docs/2012_visa_app_info.pdf)
Certificate of employment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/company_letter.pdf)
Certificate of enrollment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/school_letter.pdf)
Letter of reason for invitation (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000137089.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc. which are for purposes other than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc. which are for purposes other than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees:
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Visa Application For Holders Of Certificate Of Eligibility]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 1 May 2024.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 70 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 27
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 107
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 78 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 310 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 240 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Other Notices:

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.

## Documents Required
- Click here (https://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/files/100149151.pdf)
for the detailed information.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit passport-size color photo(s) along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Taken within 6 months
- 45mm X 35mm
- Color photo with plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- Taken without hat
Please note the Consulate-General may request for a new photo if it doesn’t meet the specifications.

## Processing Time
In principle, the visa application process takes a minimum of one week from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Consulate-General of Japan in Hong Kong).

visa_types.name: Medical Stay
visa_types.documents_required: Click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay1.html ) for the detailed information.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees:
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Medical Stay]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 1 May 2024.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 70 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 27
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 107
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 78 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 310 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 240 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Other Notices:
Visa fees will be waived for foreign nationals visiting Miyagi, Fukushima, or Iwate prefectures (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/201603_visa_info_eng.pdf). Kindly  please prepare for the hotel booking and keep your invoices / booking records  for future references.

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.
visa_types.processing_time: In principle, the visa application process takes a minimum of one week from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Consulate-General of Japan in Hong Kong).

Guarantee letter from the employer (for domestic helpers)  (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/dome_helper_form_e.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Medical Stay (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay.html)
 The visa is issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Medical Stay (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay.html)
 The visa is issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees:
All visa fees must be paid in HK dollars in cash/credit card with the application.
The visa fee may vary depending on the passport.
Please reconfirm the fee upon visa application.
Processing Fees:
All applicants are required to pay a processing fee when you submit the application at the Japan Visa Application Centre.

[Table:Medical Stay]
Additional Services:
Please note that Additional Service fees were adjusted on 1 May 2024.
The Japan Visa Application Centre in Hong Kong also provides additional services for your convenience at nominal cost.
- Photocopying services - HKD 3 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Printing services - HKD 5 per page (Black and white A4 size)
- Passport photo booth – HKD 70 for a set of 4 passport size color photo (see designated areas)
- Passport status tracking through SMS – HKD 27
- Form Filling Assistance – HKD 107
- Passport return by Hong Kong Post for delivery address in Hong Kong (Express Mail Service) – HKD 78 per application (Door to door service in Hong Kong) *
- Passport return by EMS for delivery address in Macau – HKD 310 per application (Door to door service in Macau) *
- Prime Time – HKD 240 per applicant
Official Passport & Diplomatic Passport 
The Consulate-General of Japan will continue to accept applications from Diplomatic and Official passport holders and applicants traveling on humanitarian emergency to Japan or visa transfer of issued visa to new passport.
Other Notices:
Visa fees will be waived for foreign nationals visiting Miyagi, Fukushima, or Iwate prefectures (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/201603_visa_info_eng.pdf). Kindly  please prepare for the hotel booking and keep your invoices / booking records  for future references.

Passengers who wish to travel to Okinawa for tourism purpose and  arriving by air at the Okinawa airport with booking tickets may apply for the  visa without the visa fee. 

For any further information please click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Each applicant must also pay a processing fee of HKD 310 in Hong Kong. This fee must be paid in Hong Kong dollars, either in cash or by credit card.
Please note that the processing fee is non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not. We are sorry for the inconvenience caused.

## Documents Required
Click here (http://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay1.html ) for the detailed information.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit passport-size color photo(s) along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Taken within 6 months
- 45mm X 35mm
- Color photo with plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
- Taken without hat
Please note the Consulate-General may request for a new photo if it doesn’t meet the specifications.

## Processing Time
In principle, the visa application process takes a minimum of one week from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Consulate-General of Japan in Hong Kong).

## Download Forms

Visa application form to enter Japan (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/jp/docs/2012_visa_app_info.pdf)
Certificate of employment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/company_letter.pdf)
Certificate of enrollment (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/school_letter.pdf)
Letter of reason for invitation (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000137089.pdf)
Schedule of stay (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262548.pdf)
Letter of guarantee (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262545.pdf)
Overview of Company/Organization (https://www.mofa.go.jp/files/000262547.pdf)
Guarantee letter from the employer (for domestic helpers)  (http://www.hk.emb-japan.go.jp/eng/docs/dome_helper_form_e.pdf)
